betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Hydrotreater§f

§aRemove sulfur from petroleum products — unlock desulfurized oils and a steady supply of sour gas!§f

The §bHydrotreater§f is a late-game optional machine that performs hydrodesulfurization on petroleum products. It requires §bLiquid Hydrogen§f at §e1 PU§f (pressurized via Compressor) and produces §bSour Gas§f as a byproduct. It also requires a §bCatalytic Converter§f to function (same as the Catalytic Reformer), making it a post-RBMK and post-Vacuum Refinery machine.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• §e8×§f Welded Steel Plate
§b• §e4×§f Cast Copper Plate
§b• §e8×§f Niobium Ingot
§b• §e4×§f Cadmium Steel Ingot
§b• §e2×§f Steel Shell
§b• §e8×§f Steel Pipe
§b• §e2×§f Desh Motor
§b• §e1×§f Versatile Circuit Board

§6Operation§f: Consumes §e200 kHE/s§f and §e1,000 mB/s§f input fluid (50 mB/t average).

§6Crude Oil§f: §e1,000mB§f + §e50mB§f LH → §e900mB§f Desulfurized Crude Oil + §e150mB§f Sour Gas.
§6Cracked Oil§f: §e1,000mB§f + §e50mB§f LH → §e900mB§f Desulfurized Cracked Oil + §e150mB§f Sour Gas.
§6Cracked Diesel§f: §e1,000mB§f + §e100mB§f LH → §e800mB§f Diesel + §e300mB§f Sour Gas.
§6Natural Gas§f: §e1,000mB§f + §e50mB§f LH → §e800mB§f Petroleum Gas + §e150mB§f Sour Gas.
§6Coal Oil§f: §e1,000mB§f + §e100mB§f LH → §e800mB§f Coal Gasoline + §e150mB§f Sour Gas.

§eTip§f: The hydrotreater enables a closed-loop system with the §bCatalytic Reformer§f — reformer produces Liquid Hydrogen, hydrotreater consumes it. Combined with a §bVacuum Refinery§f running on desulfurized oil, you get §bReformate Gas§f instead of Sour Gas as output!
